# GitHub Copilot Instructions

<!-- repo-context-bootstrap:BEGIN -->
Canonical agent guidance lives in `.agents/`.

Before changing files, read:

- `AGENTS.md`
- `.agents/instructions.md`
- `.agents/profile.md`
- `.agents/WORKFLOW.md`
- relevant files under `.agents/Guidelines/` and `.agents/KnowledgeBase/`

Imported GacUI reference material, if needed for comparison, is preserved under `.agents/Imported/GacUI/.github/`.
<!-- repo-context-bootstrap:END -->
